description: Draft of a legal document. Dating: 13th century. Abū l-Karam b. Ḥananyahu the Judge buys from Abū l-Ḥasan Yefet ha-Levi one quarter of a flour mill (ṭāḥūn) in the Mamṣūṣa quarter of Fustat, in the portico of Ibn Khīra, for his unmarried daughter, Sitt al-Khafar. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 327, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
